survivors_flagged.one_line: Live Henkel all-cash merger at $2.06/sh (announced Mar 2026, close 2H 2026, regulatory pending) — but stock $2.05 = spread already closed, no asymmetry left; merger-arb only on a deal-break re-cut, otherwise dead money.
Multiple ORIC-944 (mCRPC) and enozertinib (ORIC-114) readouts through mid-2026 ahead of Ph3 starts; early-stage and well-funded ($413M into 2028), modest single-name asymmetry.
Activist CEO (Hestia/Kurt Wolf); definitive Cerberus-sponsored tax-free spin-off of Capital Services pending, with shareholders to receive 80.1% of new public co.
Pivotal VAX-31 OPUS-1 Phase 3 adult topline readout dated Q4 2026 (fully enrolled, ~4,000pts, $2.7B cash); a genuine dated binary, though largely a franchise-confirmation event.

HG Vora activist + board-committed formal strategic review of ESPN Bet interactive segment, resolution targeted by end of FY2026 — real dated structural catalyst (own the suppressed core-casino value).

Oral HAE drug deucrictibant: positive pivotal RAPIDe-3 already out (binary de-risked/partly fired), but 1H26 global NDA filings + CHAPTER-3 prophylaxis readout are forward dated regulatory milestones; asymmetry mostly re-rated.

Playtika launched a formal strategic-review special committee (independent directors, Morgan Stanley advisor, dated April 6 2026), dividend suspended for balance-sheet flexibility — a real live, un-fired take-private/sale-of-assets process; classic special-sit, though outcome uncertain.

verified.catalyst: Signed all-cash Henkel acquisition at $2.06/sh (announced Mar 26, 2026), shareholder consent already secured via Advent written consent, only US HSR + UK antitrust clearances remain before close.
verified.dated_milestone: US HSR + UK CMA clearance → close expected 2H 2026; outside date Mar 31, 2027 (extendable to Sep 30, 2027). Germany cleared Jun 16, 2026; Australia cleared Jun 20, 2026.
verified.bloom_gates: None pass strictly. G1 (named counterparty Henkel) and G2 (concrete $2.06 cash commitment) are factually present but already FIRED/re-rated into the price; G3 fails — no specific currently-unpriced figure ($2.06 deal price is fully reflected at $2.05).
verified.edge: L — residual spread only; catalyst fired
verified.primary_source: Olaplex DEFM14C (filed May 4, 2026, SEC EDGAR) + MLex: Bundeskartellamt clearance Jun 16, 2026 and Australian ACCC clearance Jun 20, 2026; FMP quote $2.05 (2026-06-29).
verified.analysis: OLPX trades at $2.05 against a signed $2.06 all-cash Henkel merger (Mar 26, 2026), so the ~0.5% spread is effectively closed and the catalyst has already fired/re-rated; Advent's majority written consent removed shareholder-vote risk and Germany (Jun 16) plus Australia (Jun 20) already cleared, leaving only US HSR and UK clearance to deliver the final penny. There is no currently-unpriced forward figure (G3 fails) — the position is dead money on the upside with the sole re-rating event being a deal-break, which is a downside risk, not an asymmetric long catalyst. Merger-arb here would only become live on a re-cut after a break; absent that, tier NONE.

verified.catalyst: Cluster of 2H-2026 oncology efficacy readouts (enozertinib/ORIC-114 1L EGFR atypical mono + exon-20 mono and SC-amivantamab combo data; rinzimetostat program update) ahead of Phase 3 starts.
verified.dated_milestone: Himalayas-1 Phase 3 rinzimetostat (ORIC-944, post-abiraterone mCRPC) initiation 1H 2026; enozertinib 1L EGFR atypical mono + exon-20 mono/SC-amivantamab combo data and rinzimetostat program update all 2H 2026 (per Q1-2026 report, May 4 2026).
verified.bloom_gates: G3 (specific currently-unpriced clinical efficacy figures from named programs with dated 2H-2026 readouts); G2 partial (concrete committed Phase 3 init in 1H 2026).
verified.edge: M — multiple dated, specific, unpriced single-name binary efficacy reads, but asymmetry is modest: $419.7M cash / runway into 2H 2028 removes the financing-gap squeeze, ~$1.05B market cap already mid-range ($10.16 vs 52wk $7.23-$14.93), and 2H-2026 reads are early signal-finding (mono/combo) ahead of Phase 3, not registrational endpoints.
verified.primary_source: ORIC Q1 2026 financial results / 8-K, reported May 4 2026 (stocktitan.net summary); supported by Nov-2025 corporate-milestones update — confirmed via FMP quote $10.16, 2026-06-29.
verified.analysis: Triage claim verified against the Q1-2026 report (May 4 2026): four-plus dated clinical readouts across rinzimetostat (ORIC-944, mCRPC) and enozertinib (ORIC-114, NSCLC) land 2H 2026, with Himalayas-1 Phase 3 in mCRPC set to initiate 1H 2026 — all forward, none fired (Phase 3 dose-selection is the only fired piece). Cash of $419.7M into 2H 2028 confirms well-funded, which de-risks dilution but caps the near-term asymmetry that drives ACTIVE-tier conviction. Genuine dated forward binary-clinical catalyst, single-name (not macro), so WATCH/score-5 stands: real and trackable but only modest single-name asymmetry.

verified.catalyst: No live forward catalyst: the flagged "Cerberus 80.1% tax-free spin-off of Capital Services" is the defunct 2005-2006 transaction, while the 2026 Hestia/Kurt Wolf activist thesis has already fired (Wolf is CEO, stock re-rated on the turnaround).
verified.dated_milestone: None pending. Next dated event is routine Q2 2026 earnings (~early Aug 2026); no spin-off/divestiture date exists.
verified.bloom_gates: None pass. G1: counterparty (Cerberus) is real but from a 2005-06 deal, not a current agreement. G2/G3: no concrete dated commitment or specific currently-unpriced figure for any 2026 transaction.
verified.edge: L — thesis already re-rated; activist (Hestia) installed CEO Kurt Wolf, dividend raised five times in six quarters, guidance raised, 2027 notes redeemed/Term Loan A upsized (Jun 25 2026). The value-creation is in progress and largely priced, not a forward unpriced event.
verified.primary_source: PBI 2026 news flow via FMP press releases: Q1 2026 results + CEO letter (Business Wire, 2026-05-05); 2027 Notes redemption/Term Loan A upsize (Business Wire, 2026-06-25); Hestia share distribution noting Wolf as CEO (Business Wire, 2026-05-08). Cerberus/80.1% item traced to StreetInsider/PBI IR archive (2005-2006).
verified.analysis: The triage flag is a misattribution: the "Cerberus-sponsored tax-free spin-off with shareholders receiving 80.1%" describes Pitney Bowes' 2005-2006 Capital Services external-financing transaction, not a 2026 catalyst — the screener's news search surfaced a 20-year-old item. In 2026 the Hestia/Kurt Wolf activism has already succeeded and fired: Wolf is the sitting CEO, and recent news (May-Jun 2026) is balance-sheet optimization and capital return (dividend to $0.10, fifth hike in six quarters; redeemed $347M 2027 notes; upsized Term Loan A by $150M; raised FY guidance), all reflecting a turnaround already underway and substantially priced. No current definitive or pending spin-off, divestiture, or other dated forward unpriced transaction exists, so it fails the strict gate.

verified.catalyst: VAX-31 OPUS-1 Phase 3 adult pivotal topline (safety/tolerability/immunogenicity, noninferiority vs Capvaxive PCV21 and Prevnar 20) reads out in Q4 2026.
verified.dated_milestone: OPUS-1 Phase 3 adult topline — Q4 2026 (next; OPUS-2/OPUS-3 follow 1H 2027)
verified.bloom_gates: G2 (concrete committed trial fully enrolled ~4,000pts with dated readout) + G3 (specific dated immunogenicity readout vs named comparators, outcome not yet priced)
verified.primary_source: Vaxcyte press release / GlobeNewswire, "Vaxcyte Completes Enrollment of OPUS-1 and OPUS-2 Phase 3 Trials," March 23, 2026 (OPUS-1 topline expected Q4 2026)
verified.analysis: PCVX has a genuine, dated, forward binary: OPUS-1 Phase 3 adult topline confirmed for Q4 2026 in the March 23, 2026 enrollment-completion release, with ~4,000 participants in a noninferiority head-to-head vs Capvaxive and Prevnar 20 — not yet fired. The edge is moderated because positive Phase 1/2 adult data (published in Lancet ID) already established best-in-class immunogenicity signal, so OPUS-1 functions largely as franchise confirmation rather than a high-variance first-look efficacy gate, and the $8.3B market cap / $57.7 price (mid-range of the 52wk band) implies meaningful de-risking is already in the tape. Cash position (~$2.7B per triage) not independently re-confirmed this pass (8-K fetch 403'd), but the dated catalyst itself is solid; WATCH at score 6.

verified.catalyst: The HG Vora activist campaign and the board-committed strategic review of the ESPN Bet interactive segment that the triage flag relied on have both already resolved — the ESPN Bet deal was terminated Dec 1, 2025 and HG Vora settled into a standstill — so the structural catalyst is fired and re-rated, not forward.
verified.dated_milestone: No live forward milestone; the FY2026-resolution review already concluded (ESPN Bet terminated 2025-12-01, restructuring confirmed at Q4 earnings Feb 2026). Next routine event = Q2 2026 earnings (~Aug 2026), not a catalyst.
verified.bloom_gates: None pass forward. G1 counterparty (HG Vora) exists but settled into a standstill (activism ceased, stake capped ≤5%); G2 commitment (strategic review of interactive segment) was made but already executed via the ESPN Bet termination; G3 has no specific currently-unpriced figure remaining — the resolution is in the past and re-rated.
verified.edge: L — the entire thesis (own the suppressed core-casino value via an activist-forced review of the digital drag) is now public, fired, and priced: ESPN Bet exit done, HG Vora neutralized by cooperation agreement, restructuring already disclosed. No dated, unpriced forward edge remains; only a speculative take-private theme (24/7 Wall St) with no named counterparty or committed deal.
verified.primary_source: Businesswire / PENN IR: "PENN Entertainment and ESPN Mutually Agree to Early Termination of U.S. Online Sports Betting Agreement" (2025-11-06, effective 2025-12-01); HG Vora cooperation/standstill settlement (Gambling Insider, June 2025); PENN Q1 2026 8-K and DEF 14A FY2026 (SEC).
verified.analysis: The flagged catalyst is stale: HG Vora's April 2025 13D campaign settled into a cooperation/standstill agreement (activism ceased, stake limited to ≤5%, board expanded to 11), and the board-committed strategic review of the ESPN Bet interactive segment resolved when PENN and ESPN mutually terminated the U.S. OSB agreement effective Dec 1, 2025, followed by a confirmed iCasino-led restructuring disclosed at Q4 2025 earnings in Feb 2026. There is no remaining dated, forward, unpriced structural milestone — the "resolution targeted by end of FY2026" already happened and was re-rated through late 2025 / early 2026. The only residual angle is a generic take-private/buyout-candidate theme post-Caesars with no named counterparty, no committed deal, and no specific figure, which is speculative/macro and does not clear the strict gate.

verified.catalyst: CHAPTER-3 pivotal Phase 3 topline readout for deucrictibant XR in HAE prophylaxis — the larger chronic-dosing market — with the on-demand NDA filing as a secondary near-term milestone.
verified.dated_milestone: CHAPTER-3 topline data expected 3Q2026 (enrollment completed, announced 2026-04-02); on-demand IR NDA submission on-track 1H2026 (window closes 2026-06-30).
verified.instrument: PHVS (NASDAQ common; pre-revenue HAE clinical biotech, mkt cap ~$2.4B)
verified.bloom_gates: G3 — specific currently-unpriced figure/event: CHAPTER-3 prophylaxis Phase 3 readout dated to 3Q2026, distinct from the already-fired RAPIDe-3 on-demand data and addressing the larger chronic-prophylaxis market not yet de-risked in the stock.
verified.edge: M — CHAPTER-3 is a genuine dated forward binary on the bigger prophylaxis opportunity (unpriced as a derisked outcome), but the equity has already re-rated hard post-RAPIDe-3 ($34.71 vs $26.70 200-day, near 52-wk high $35.33), and the on-demand NDA is just an administrative filing of already-public data, so residual asymmetry is moderate, not high.
verified.primary_source: Pharvaris press release "Completion of Enrollment in CHAPTER-3 Study of Deucrictibant XR for HAE Prophylaxis, with Topline Data Expected in 3Q2026" (2026-04-02), corroborated by RAPIDe-3 positive topline release and 2026 strategic priorities (2026-01-12); FMP quote $34.71 (2026-06-29).
verified.analysis: The triage flag is correct that the on-demand thread is largely fired: RAPIDe-3 hit its primary and all 11 secondary endpoints (positive topline already public), and the 1H26 IR NDA is a filing of known data with the window closing 2026-06-30 — mostly re-rated, low incremental asymmetry. The live, dated, forward catalyst is CHAPTER-3 (deucrictibant XR for HAE prophylaxis): enrollment completed per the 2026-04-02 release with topline expected 3Q2026, targeting the larger chronic-dosing market and not yet de-risked in the price. Clears the forward/dated/specific gate as a WATCH, but the stock trading near its 52-week high after a sharp post-RAPIDe-3 re-rate caps the upside, so score 5 / not ACTIVE.

verified.catalyst: Playtika's board-appointed Special Committee of independent directors, advised by Morgan Stanley, is running a portfolio-wide strategic-alternatives review that could result in a sale, take-private, or asset divestiture.
verified.dated_milestone: Review launched April 6, 2026; no disclosure until Committee/Board approve a course of action (no scheduled next date — company explicitly declines interim updates); next natural checkpoint Q2 2026 earnings (~early Aug 2026)
verified.bloom_gates: G2 only (concrete commitment: real Special Committee of independent directors + named advisor Morgan Stanley, dated Apr 6 2026). FAILS G1 (no named counterparty/bidder) and G3 (no offer price, deal value, or quantified unpriced figure disclosed).
verified.edge: L — open-ended review with no named bidder, no price, no deadline; company refuses interim disclosure and warns "no assurance" of any transaction. No arb spread to underwrite; pure optionality on a de-rated micro-cap ($3.91 vs 52wk $2.64-$5.05).
verified.primary_source: Playtika 8-K / GlobeNewswire press release "Playtika Announces Review of Strategic Alternatives," April 6, 2026; corroborated by Q1 2026 results, May 7, 2026.
verified.analysis: The strategic-review process is real, dated (Apr 6 2026), and genuinely forward (not fired — no deal announced): a Special Committee of solely independent directors retained Morgan Stanley to evaluate alternatives across the portfolio, a classic special-situation. However, the triage's "dividend suspended for balance-sheet flexibility" claim is REFUTED: Q1 2026 results (May 7) show Playtika paid $37.7M in dividends with no suspension announcement, an embellishment that should be discounted. With no named counterparty (fails G1), no offer price or quantified spread (fails G3), an explicit "no assurance" caveat, and a company policy of no interim updates, there is no underwritable edge — this is open-ended optionality, not a merger-arb spread, so it belongs on WATCH (demoted from ACTIVE 6), with the lane corrected from merger-arb to special_situation.
